notes: T058: web-demo/src/audio/SFXManager.ts created. Web Audio API procedural synthesis — no external assets. flip: 440Hz ping 80ms + 880Hz shimmer 40ms. win: C4-E4-G4-C5 ascending arpeggio 80ms each + C3 pad. lose: 220→100Hz exponential glide 400ms + bandpass noise thud. unlock: 880Hz bell + partials 1318/1760Hz + 2 reverb echoes at +80ms/+180ms + 2637Hz shimmer. end: C3-E3-G3-C4 chord 3s fade. AudioContext resumes on first click/keydown (browser autoplay policy). Listens to window merlin_sfx CustomEvent. state_machine: main.ts — runMerlinLair() inserted between runMainMenu() and game bootstrap. initSFXManager() called at top of main() before boot. Lair loop: rAF tick, zone tooltip, Door/Map resolve+cutToBlack, Crystal/Bookshelf tooltip-only. index.html: #lair-canvas-wrapper + #lair-tooltip divs + CSS added.
